/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/Opdracht1.dir/engine.cc.o CMakeFiles/Opdracht1.dir/utils/easy_image.cc.o CMakeFiles/Opdracht1.dir/utils/ini_configuration.cc.o CMakeFiles/Opdracht1.dir/Color.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Opdracht1.dir/Point2D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Opdracht1.dir/Line2D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Opdracht1.dir/l_parser.cc.o CMakeFiles/Opdracht1.dir/vector/vector3d.cc.o CMakeFiles/Opdracht1.dir/ZBuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Opdracht1.dir/PointLight.cpp.o -o Opdracht1
